prelearning.initInfo: Pre-learning assessment is being created. Please wait for the completion notification!
prelearning.sessionDesc: Evaluate basic skills based on current objectives
prelearning.createError: Unable to create the competency assessment right now. Please try again later.
prelearning.uploadBlockedError: Please complete the Pre-learning assessment before uploading new documents.

workspace.confirmDeleteFlashcard: Are you sure you want to delete this flashcard set?

profileConfig.title: Set up your workspace learning profile
profileConfig.readOnlyDesc: Review the learning profile, goals, and roadmap settings currently stored for this workspace.
profileConfig.editDesc: Move step by step to define your learning intent, knowledge focus, goals, and roadmap or mock-test setup.

confirmProfileDialog.title: Confirm using this profile
confirmProfileDialog.description: Are you sure you want to use this profile? Once confirmed, the current configuration will be saved for this workspace.
confirmProfileDialog.roadmapDisabled: Roadmap is not enabled for this profile.

1.title: Step 1
1.description: Choose how you want to learn and let AI identify the right knowledge area.

2.title: Step 2
2.description: Add your current level, goals, and focus areas so AI can guide the next steps.

3.title: Step 3
3.description: Finalize the knowledge amount, study pace, and estimated number of days for the roadmap.

4.title: Step 4
4.description: Finalize the roadmap settings, learning pace, and workspace profile.

STUDY_NEW.title: Study new
STUDY_NEW.description: Start a new topic, build the foundation, and still create mock tests when needed.

REVIEW.title: Review
REVIEW.description: Reinforce what you already studied, focus on gaps, and still create mock tests when needed.

MOCK_TEST.title: Mock test
MOCK_TEST.description: Prepare for a target exam with template setup, target score, and expected exam date.

idle.title: Enter a knowledge topic to start AI analysis
idle.description: The system will infer the best-fit domain from the knowledge topic you enter.

loading.title: AI is analyzing your knowledge input
loading.description: The system is inferring the most relevant field and preparing domain suggestions.

success.title: AI has inferred the most relevant domain
success.description: Confirm the suggested domain to continue to the next step.

stepOne.title: Define the knowledge focus and learning style
stepOne.description: Choose the main learning mode, enter what you want to learn, and let Quizmate AI suggest the right domain.
stepOne.knowledgeTitle: Your knowledge topic and AI-inferred domain
stepOne.knowledgeDescription: Describe what you want to learn. AI will infer the most relevant domain and suggest a field for you to confirm.
stepOne.noDomainSuggestionTitle: Quizmate AI does not have enough domains to suggest yet.
stepOne.noDomainSuggestionDescription: Add a clearer language, exam, or narrower topic. If this is a shorthand level like N1 or N4, the system will prioritize inferring related domains as soon as it has enough signal.

domainReason.closest: This matches the signal "{{signal}}" inside "{{knowledge}}", so it is the closest domain to what you entered.
domainReason.group: The signal "{{signal}}" belongs to the same knowledge cluster as "{{domain}}", so this domain still stays very close to your input.
domainReason.context: "{{domain}}" sits in the same learning context as "{{knowledge}}", which helps AI expand in the right direction.
domainReason.languagePair: This is a reasonable interpretation if "{{knowledge}}" points to learning or using {{domain}} within this language pair.
domainReason.translation: This fits if you want to translate, compare, or convert content in the direction of {{domain}}.
domainReason.studyBridge: This fits if you want to use one language as the explanation language to learn through {{domain}}.

stepOne.knowledgeNudgeTitle: This knowledge input is still too broad
stepOne.knowledgeNudgeDescription: Add more detail about scope, materials, or target skills so the AI can narrow its recommendations.
stepOne.analysisError: AI analysis failed. Please try again.
stepOne.knowledgeBroadHint: Go back to the Knowledge field and be more specific about the scope, materials, or skills you want to learn.
stepOne.analysisSummaryTitle: Quizmate AI currently understands this as
stepOne.analysisRefinementTitle: You can rewrite it like this
stepOne.studyNewLockedDescription: This option requires a plan with roadmap creation.
stepOne.studyNewLockedHint: The current plan does not include roadmap creation, so Quizmate AI switches this workspace to review mode.
stepOne.roadmapQuestion: Do you want AI to generate a roadmap as well?
stepOne.roadmapDescription: This option only appears for review and mock-test flows.
stepOne.skipRoadmap: No roadmap, keep only the remaining setup

stepTwo.title: Describe your current state
stepTwo.description: Add enough context so the final recommendations match your real level and destination.
stepTwo.mockTestTitle: Set the exam and mock-test template
stepTwo.mockTestDescription: Choose a public or private exam. For public exams, Quizmate AI will show a ready-made reference template that follows the public exam structure.
stepTwo.noPublicExam: No public exams match your current search.
stepTwo.publicTemplateDescription: Quizmate AI shows the public exam structure right away so you can review the real layout before starting the mock test.
stepTwo.supportNoticeDescription: Quizmate AI currently works best for multiple-choice sections. Writing and Listening are not fully supported yet, so the template below is mainly for understanding the public exam structure.
stepTwo.templateDescription: Describe your preferred mock-test structure, then generate a UI preview right inside this step.
stepTwo.contextTitle: Aligned with the confirmed context from step 1
stepTwo.contextDescription: Every suggestion in this step is based on the knowledge "{{knowledge}}" inside the domain "{{domain}}". Describe your actual ability in this scope, not your overall strengths.
stepTwo.currentLevelDescription: Describe your current level inside the selected knowledge and domain, for example solid N5 foundation, basic kanji knowledge, or weak N4 grammar.
stepTwo.strengthWeaknessTitle: 2. Strengths and weaknesses in this exact scope
stepTwo.strengthWeaknessDescription: The strengths and weaknesses here must describe sub-areas directly inside the knowledge you are learning, such as grammar, vocabulary, reading comprehension, or kanji; do not switch to a different subject such as math.
stepTwo.waitForCurrentLevelTitle: Fill in your current level first
stepTwo.waitForCurrentLevelDescription: After you describe your current level, AI will suggest strengths and weaknesses that match the selected knowledge more closely.
stepTwo.beginnerContextTitle: You are currently at the starting stage
stepTwo.beginnerContextDescription: At this stage, you do not need clear strengths or weaknesses inside {{scope}} yet. You can briefly say that you are still building the basics, then refine it later after you have studied for a while.
stepTwo.beginnerStrongSuggestion1: I am just starting, so I cannot identify a clear strength yet.
stepTwo.beginnerStrongSuggestion2: Still building the basic foundation for {{scope}} from scratch.
stepTwo.beginnerStrongSuggestion3: Ready to learn consistently and follow an entry-level path for {{scope}}.
stepTwo.beginnerWeakSuggestion1: I am just starting, so I cannot identify a clear weakness yet.
stepTwo.beginnerWeakSuggestion2: Not yet familiar with the core terms, question types, or baseline skills in {{scope}}.
stepTwo.beginnerWeakSuggestion3: Need more time to build basic study habits and early-stage reflexes.
stepTwo.beginnerWeakSuggestionJapanese1: The learner is still weak in the foundation of {{scope}}, especially hiragana, katakana, basic vocabulary, and basic sentence patterns.
stepTwo.beginnerWeakSuggestionJapanese2: Not yet comfortable with basic Japanese listening, reading, and response patterns within {{scope}}.
stepTwo.beginnerWeakSuggestionJapanese3: Need time to remember characters, vocabulary, and beginner grammar.
stepTwo.learningGoalDescription: Your learning goal should move from your current level toward the exact knowledge scope you are studying. AI only suggests a tighter goal after it has your current level, strengths, and weaknesses.
stepTwo.waitForGoalTitle: Add strengths and weaknesses for a better goal suggestion
stepTwo.waitForGoalDescription: Once current level, strengths, and weaknesses are filled with the right context, AI will suggest a more specific learning goal. You can still type your own goal if your real situation is different.
stepTwo.beginnerWaitForGoalTitle: You can still set a learning goal from the very beginning
stepTwo.beginnerWaitForGoalDescription: If you do not have clear strengths or weaknesses in {{scope}} yet, you can briefly say that you are still building the basics. AI can still suggest a useful starting goal.
stepTwo.beginnerLearningGoalSuggestion1: Build a basic foundation in {{scope}} before raising the difficulty.
stepTwo.beginnerLearningGoalSuggestion2: Set up a steady beginner path for {{scope}} in the first phase.
stepTwo.beginnerLearningGoalSuggestionJapanese1: Learn hiragana, katakana, and core vocabulary before aiming higher.
stepTwo.beginnerLearningGoalSuggestionJapanese2: Get comfortable with basic sentence patterns and early Japanese reflexes in the first few weeks.
stepTwo.fieldSuggestionLoading: AI is analyzing step 2 and updating suggestions based on the context you entered...
stepTwo.overallReviewLoadingTitle: AI is reviewing the full step
stepTwo.overallReviewLoadingDescription: The system is checking whether your current level, strengths, weaknesses, and learning goal still match the knowledge you selected.
stepTwo.overallReviewPendingTitle: The overall review will appear after you fill enough detail
stepTwo.overallReviewPendingDescription: Fill in your current level, strengths, weaknesses, and learning goal. Then AI will check whether the whole step 2 stays aligned with the knowledge and domain you selected.
stepTwo.beginnerOverallReviewPendingDescription: Fill in your current level and learning goal. If you are just starting, strengths and weaknesses can stay empty or simply say that you are still building the basics in {{scope}}.
stepTwo.aiRecommendationNotice: This is AI guidance only. You can still adjust it to match your real situation.

stepThree.summaryDescription: Review the main goal so the roadmap and final recommendations stay aligned with this workspace.
stepThree.improvementDescription: Choose one or more areas for AI to prioritize in the roadmap, review plan, or mock test.
stepThree.roadmapDescription: Separate how much knowledge you want to cover from how quickly you want to absorb it, how many days you plan to study, and how many minutes you should spend each day.
stepThree.knowledgeLoadHint: Knowledge amount defines how much content you want to learn. Study speed only defines the time pace, while the system spreads that workload across recommended days and minutes per day.
stepThree.scheduleInsightSuggested: With the current setup, Quizmate AI recommends about {{days}} days at the {{speed}} pace to cover the selected amount of knowledge.
stepThree.scheduleInsightAdjusted: You entered {{days}} days, so the system automatically mapped this to the {{speed}} pace. The nearest suggested baseline is {{recommendedDays}} days.
stepThree.minutesInsightSuggested: To spread the workload evenly across {{days}} days, Quizmate AI recommends about {{minutes}} minutes/day.
stepThree.minutesInsightAdjusted: You are currently setting {{minutes}} minutes/day. For this setup, the balanced recommendation is about {{recommendedMinutes}} minutes/day.
stepThree.noRoadmapDescription: The wizard will still save your goals, focus areas, and mock-test information.
stepThree.mockGoalDescription: Select an AI-recommended score for a public exam or enter a custom target for a private one.

messages.mockTemplateGenerating: The template is being generated. The wizard will move to the next step automatically when it is ready.
messages.mockTemplateReady: The template is ready. You can continue to the next step.
messages.mockTemplateStatusError: The template status could not be checked right now. Please try again in a few minutes.
messages.mockTemplateAwaitingBackend: Waiting for the backend to confirm the template is finished. {{seconds}} seconds elapsed.
messages.mockTemplateLongWait: The backend is still processing the template. {{seconds}} seconds elapsed. Please check the status again if it takes too long.
messages.backgroundMockTestReady: The mock test finished in the background. You can open Mock test to review it now.
messages.saveError: Unable to save the workspace setup progress.

placeholders.knowledgeInput: Examples: IELTS Writing task 2, advanced React hooks, introductory probability...
placeholders.knowledgeDescription: Describe the scope, materials, chapters, or exact skills you want AI to understand better...
placeholders.primaryDomain: The main domain will be filled from the AI suggestion you choose...
placeholders.currentLevel: Examples: IELTS 5.5, comfortable with basic React, grade 11 math...
placeholders.learningGoal: Examples: Reach IELTS 7.0 in three months, master probability for the final exam...

learningGoalByPurpose.STUDY_NEW: Example: Build a solid React foundation and complete a first practical project...
learningGoalByPurpose.REVIEW: Example: Review the weak chapters and recover enough confidence for the final exam...
learningGoalByPurpose.MOCK_TEST: Example: Practice under real exam pressure and stabilize performance before the test...

placeholders.strongAreas: Examples: fast reading, strong memory, solid coding fundamentals...
placeholders.weakAreas: Examples: grammar, time management, higher-order questions...
placeholders.beginnerStrongAreas: Example: I am just starting, so I cannot identify a clear strength yet...
placeholders.beginnerWeakAreas: Example: I am just starting, so I cannot identify a clear weakness yet...
placeholders.beginnerWeakAreasJapanese: Example: I am just starting, so I cannot identify a clear weakness yet...
placeholders.publicExamSearch: Search by exam name such as IELTS, TOEIC, JLPT...
placeholders.privateExamName: Type your private exam name or custom format...
placeholders.templatePrompt: Example: Create a mock exam focused on reading and writing, with rising difficulty and common-error review...
placeholders.templateNotes: Example: prioritize scenario-based questions, stay close to the official format, avoid trick questions...

BASIC.title: Basic
BASIC.description: Focus on core foundations, key terms, and the minimum required concepts.

INTERMEDIATE.title: Intermediate
INTERMEDIATE.description: Cover the foundations plus the common real-world applications you are expected to use.

ADVANCED.title: Advanced
ADVANCED.description: Go deeper into harder cases, edge cases, and higher-complexity material.

FLEXIBLE.title: Flexible
FLEXIBLE.description: Adjust the pace according to your real schedule and current energy.

BALANCED.title: Fixed
BALANCED.description: Keep the study plan steady, follow the roadmap closely, and limit pace changes.

INTENSIVE.title: Intensive
INTENSIVE.description: Move faster with a higher workload and denser checkpoints.

SLOW.title: Slow and steady
SLOW.description: Best when you want depth and only have limited time each day.

STANDARD.title: Standard
STANDARD.description: A balanced default pace for most learners.

FAST.title: Fast
FAST.description: Accelerate toward a close deadline or upcoming exam.

sources.summaryOnDemandHint: Summary is generated only when you press the button.

chat.title: Learning Area
chat.emptyDesc: Upload documents and pick an activity from Studio to begin.
chat.prelearningDesc: Complete the assessment so AI can build a roadmap tailored for you.

quizMode.manualDesc: Take the quiz with a timer, submit to see your score
quizMode.companionDesc: AI reads questions, you answer by voice
quizMode.practiceDesc: See answers & explanations after each question

chat.requireUpload: Upload materials first to unlock these actions.

studio.title: Studio
studio.emptyDesc: Pick an activity below to get started.
studio.questionStatsHint: This is where your learning progress in this workspace is tracked. Keep completing quizzes to unlock deeper analysis.

questionStats.title: Question Statistics
questionStats.viewQuestionDesc: Track accuracy, progress, and performance by question difficulty or Bloom level.
questionStats.viewQuizDesc: Review completion rate, average score, and performance for each quiz in this workspace.
questionStats.label: Label
questionStats.currentStatsDesc: Based on the latest attempt for each question
questionStats.quizCurrentDesc: Based on quizzes attempted in the selected mode.
questionStats.quizLifetimeDesc: Aggregated across all quiz attempts in this workspace.
questionStats.quizLeaderboardDesc: Recent quiz list with accuracy, completion time, and latest completion.
questionStats.strongAreaDesc: Complete more questions so the system can identify the knowledge area you handle best.
questionStats.needsFocusDesc: Keep practicing so the system can point to the weakest area more reliably.
questionStats.bestQuizDesc: Finish more quizzes to identify the quiz where you currently perform best.
questionStats.reviewQuizDesc: Once there is enough data, the system will suggest the quiz that needs review first.
questionStats.welcomeDesc: Complete more quizzes to see detailed analysis of your strengths and areas to improve by difficulty and Bloom level.

upload.title: Upload Documents
upload.groupReviewDescription: Your documents will be checked by the group's profile, then queued for leader approval before appearing in shared sources.
upload.desc: Choose the type of document you want to add to this workspace.
upload.dragOnlyHint: Drag and drop files into this area only
upload.supportedFormats: Supported: pdf, docx, doc, pptx, ppt, xlsx, xls, txt, png, mp3, mp4
upload.suggestMissingWorkspace: Workspace not found. Cannot load suggestions.
upload.webYoutubeSuccess: The URL has been sent for processing.
upload.webYoutubeError: Unable to process the YouTube URL.
upload.webYoutubeDescription: Paste YouTube URLs below to add them as a source in this workspace.
upload.webYoutubeNote1: To add multiple URLs, separate them with spaces or new lines.
upload.webYoutubeNote2: Only visible webpage text can be imported.
upload.webYoutubeNote4: Only YouTube video transcripts can be imported.
upload.webYoutubeNote5: Only public YouTube videos are supported.
upload.uploadAllSuccess: Uploaded both user files and suggested files successfully.
upload.uploadPending: Your document has been submitted and may still be processing. Please wait a moment then check your sources list.
upload.maxFilesDesc: Confirm how many documents will be used in this workspace.

quiz.createDesc: Create a quiz for your workspace.
quiz.challengeDraftDesc: Draft the challenge quiz: set the name, difficulty, timing, questions, and answers.

insufficientCredit.title: Not enough QMC credits
insufficientCredit.hint: Buy a credit pack to top up your workspace balance, then try generating the quiz again.

quiz.name: Quiz Name
quiz.timerModeHintOn: All questions share the overall quiz duration

quiz.confirmExam: Start this quiz in test mode?

navigator.title: Question Navigator
navigator.lastUnlocked: Must keep at least 1 unlocked question for auto-balancing

strategyDesc.balanced: Standard weight ratio between difficulty levels. Suitable for most quizzes.
strategyDesc.linear: Evenly increasing weight. Higher difficulty questions receive proportionally more points.
strategyDesc.elite: Strongly rewards hard questions. Ideal for advanced or competitive assessments.
strategyDesc.tight: Nearly equal weight across all levels. Best for knowledge-check quizzes.

quiz.processingProgressHint: The system is generating questions and configuring the quiz.
quiz.deleteFail: Unable to delete this quiz right now.

groupAudience.pickMemberHint: Pick someone to see only quizzes assigned to them

bulk.confirmAssignDescription: Choose assignment mode for {{count}} selected quizzes.

bulk.memberRequired: Please select a member before assigning quizzes.
bulk.failed: Bulk action could not complete fully. Succeeded {{success}}/{{total}} quizzes.

communityRecommendations.title: Matching quizzes for this workspace
communityRecommendations.description: Quizmate AI found a few community quizzes that fit the current learning behavior here. If one looks right, you can clone it straight into this workspace.
communityRecommendations.cloneError: Unable to clone this quiz right now.

metrics.title: Recommendation effectiveness
metrics.description: Thirty-day funnel for quizzes recommended in this workspace.

comparison.title: Offline lexical vs semantic comparison
comparison.description: Based on served recommendation snapshots: how many positive outcomes lexical-only would keep, and how many semantic signals actually rescued.

samples.title: Recent sample requests
samples.description: Inspect concrete requests to see which quizzes semantic rescued, what the lexical rank was, and how far each one converted.
samples.rescuedExplanation: Semantic lifted this quiz because lexical rank {{lexicalRank}} would sit outside the {{servedCount}} served slots.
samples.retainedExplanation: This quiz stayed inside lexical top at rank {{lexicalRank}}, so lexical-only could also have shown it.
samples.convertPassed: Downstream outcome: cloned, started, and passed.
samples.convertStarted: Downstream outcome: cloned and started, but no pass event yet.
samples.convertCloned: Downstream outcome: cloned, but no start event yet.
samples.convertNone: No downstream conversion has been recorded for this quiz yet.
samples.emptyRescued: No requests with semantic rescued candidates were found in this time window.
samples.emptyConverted: No requests with downstream conversion were found in this time window.

audience.title: Quiz distribution

console.feedbackStatusError: Error while fetching quiz feedback status:

leaderParticipation.title: Do you want to join the ranking?
leaderParticipation.description: Choose the leader's participation mode before publishing the quiz to the group.
leaderParticipation.joinDescription: The leader takes the quiz first. Once completed, the quiz will be activated for members. The leader's score will count toward the ranking.
leaderParticipation.skipDescription: Publish immediately to members. The leader can still take the quiz, but the result will not count toward the ranking.

individualWorkspaceProfileOverviewDialog.title: Workspace profile overview
individualWorkspaceProfileOverviewDialog.description: A short summary of the key configuration saved for this workspace.
individualWorkspaceProfileOverviewDialog.learningSummaryDescription: The key learning configuration saved for this workspace.
individualWorkspaceProfileOverviewDialog.personalStrengthsDescription: Learner context configured for this workspace.
individualWorkspaceProfileOverviewDialog.roadmapDescription: Roadmap settings currently applied to this workspace.
individualWorkspaceProfileOverviewDialog.mockDescription: Keep only the exam settings you still need to remember.
individualWorkspaceProfileOverviewDialog.editLockedHint: This workspace already has materials. Remove them before updating onboarding again.
individualWorkspaceProfileOverviewDialog.editUnlockHint: You can update profile workspace when has no materials.

workspaceProfileStepTwo.beginnerStrongSuggestion1: Just getting started so strong points are not clearly defined yet.
workspaceProfileStepTwo.beginnerWeakSuggestion1: Just getting started so weak points are not clearly defined yet.
workspaceProfileStepTwo.beginnerLearningGoalSuggestionJapanese1: Master hiragana, katakana and basic vocabulary before setting higher goals.
workspaceProfileStepTwo.beginnerLearningGoalSuggestionJapanese2: Get familiar with sentence patterns and basic Japanese reflexes in the first few weeks.
workspaceProfileStepTwo.beginnerLearningGoalSuggestion1: Get familiar with the basic foundation of {{scope}} before increasing difficulty.
workspaceProfileStepTwo.beginnerLearningGoalSuggestion2: Build a solid introductory roadmap for {{scope}} in the early stage.
workspaceProfileStepTwo.beginnerStrongAreasPlaceholder: E.g.: just getting started so strong points are not clearly defined yet...
workspaceProfileStepTwo.beginnerWeakAreasPlaceholder: E.g.: just getting started so weak points are not clearly defined yet...
workspaceProfileStepTwo.currentLevelDescription: Describe your current level in the exact knowledge and field you chose, e.g. N5 foundation, know basic kanji, weak in N4 grammar.
workspaceProfileStepTwo.strengthWeaknessTitle: 2. Strong and weak points within this scope
workspaceProfileStepTwo.waitForCurrentLevelDescription: Once you describe your current level, Quizmate AI will suggest strong and weak points more closely aligned with the knowledge you chose.
workspaceProfileStepTwo.beginnerContextDescription: At this stage you don't need clearly defined strong or weak points in {{scope}}. You can briefly note that you are building from the basics, then add more as you progress.
workspaceProfileStepTwo.beginnerWaitForGoalTitle: You can still set learning goals from the start
workspaceProfileStepTwo.waitForGoalTitle: Add strong and weak points for Quizmate AI to suggest goals
workspaceProfileStepTwo.beginnerWaitForGoalDescription: If you don't yet have clearly defined strong or weak points in {{scope}}, briefly describe that you are building a basic foundation. Quizmate AI can still suggest goals to get you started in the right direction.
workspaceProfileStepTwo.waitForGoalDescription: Once you have the current level, strong and weak points in context, Quizmate AI will suggest more specific learning goals. You can also enter goals according to your actual needs.
workspaceProfileStepTwo.analyzingBanner: AI is analyzing and suggesting suitable content...
workspaceProfileStepTwo.overallReviewLoadingTitle: Quizmate AI is evaluating the overall profile
workspaceProfileStepTwo.overallReviewLoadingDescription: The system is checking whether the current level, strong points, weak points and learning goals match the knowledge you chose.
workspaceProfileStepTwo.overallReviewPendingTitle: Overall review will appear once you complete the data
workspaceProfileStepTwo.beginnerOverallReviewPendingDescription: Please fill in current level and learning goals. If you are just starting out, the strong and weak points can be left blank or described as building a basic foundation in {{scope}}.
workspaceProfileStepTwo.overallReviewPendingDescription: Please fill in current level, strong points, weak points and learning goals. Then Quizmate AI will check whether the entire Step 2 matches the knowledge and field you chose.
workspaceProfileStepTwo.aiRecommendationNotice: This is a reference suggestion from Quizmate AI; you can adjust according to your actual context.

examConfig.popularSectionDescription: Click an exam name to see the templates suggested by Quizmate AI.
examConfig.noPopularExams: There is no list of "popular exams" yet. Fill in the information in Step 1-2 for Quizmate AI to suggest.
examConfig.applyingDescription: The template for {{examName}} is being used to fill the exam configuration in the form below.
examConfig.noTemplateDescription: Click "Use this template" to auto-fill the duration, number of questions and structure notes.
examConfig.noTemplatesInResponse: There are no templates in the response for this exam.

preview.noticeBody: You are previewing the display outline (Format Demo) of the exam. The questions below are sample data for illustration, not the actual question content.

quizResultPage.generateKnowledgeSuccess: Knowledge generation request sent for this phase.
quizResultPage.generateKnowledgeFail: Failed to generate knowledge. Please try again.
quizResultPage.skipDecisionMissingPhase: Cannot determine the phase for this decision.

quizResultPage.skipPhaseFail: Could not update skip decision for this phase.
quizResultPage.incompleteAttempt: This quiz attempt is not complete yet. Return to continue or submit before viewing the result.
quizResultPage.pendingOrMissing: This attempt result is not ready yet or no longer exists.
quizResultPage.unavailable: This attempt result is currently unavailable. Please try again.
quizResultPage.profileResultPending: The system will suggest more accurately after a few more quizzes.
quizResultPage.generateFromAssessmentSuccess: Quiz generated from AI assessment successfully.
quizResultPage.generateFromAssessmentFail: Failed to generate quiz from AI assessment.
quizResultPage.title: Result
quizResultPage.assessmentProcessing: AI assessment is still processing. This page will refresh automatically.
quizResultPage.assessmentFailed: AI assessment could not be completed yet. Try refreshing after grading finishes.
quizResultPage.skipPhaseEligibleHint: You are eligible to skip this phase. Do you want to skip or continue practicing?
quizResultPage.noReviewData: No detailed data available to review this attempt.
quizResultPage.questionListHint: Click a number to jump straight to that question.

workspaceProfileStepUpload.title: Upload materials and review their fit
workspaceProfileStepUpload.description: Upload the materials you want to study. The UI will review how closely each document matches your knowledge, domain, level, goals, strengths, weaknesses, and exam setup.
workspaceProfileStepUpload.contextDescription: These are the signals used to review whether a material belongs in this workspace.
workspaceProfileStepUpload.dropTitle: Drop files here or browse from your device
workspaceProfileStepUpload.dropDescription: You can upload PDF, DOCX, PPTX, XLSX, TXT, image, audio, or video files.
workspaceProfileStepUpload.reviewDescription: Each row explains why a document matches or does not match the profile above.
workspaceProfileStepUpload.statusDescription: Only materials that pass the profile check will be added to the workspace and unlock step 4.
workspaceProfileStepUpload.emptyTitle: Upload at least one material to continue
workspaceProfileStepUpload.emptyDescription: The next step only makes sense when the workspace already has materials to study from.

summary.pending: This file is still waiting to be checked and uploaded. It will only be added to the workspace if it matches the current learning profile.
summary.processing: The material has been uploaded and is waiting for deeper processing. The fit preview below is based on the profile signals currently available.
summary.criticalBase: This material already has a warning from the system or does not yet show a clear connection to the workspace profile.
summary.noConnection: The file name does not yet show a clear connection to your knowledge, domain, level, or learning target.
summary.strongMatch: This material stays closely connected to {{labels}}, so it fits the current workspace well.
summary.partialMatch: This material already connects to {{labels}}, but you should still review the content quality after upload.

progress.passedFirstCheck: {{count}} selected file(s) passed the first check and can be uploaded.
progress.notPassedFirstCheck: The selected files have not passed the first check yet.
progress.alreadyHasValid: The workspace already has valid study materials for the roadmap.

individualWorkspaceProfileConfigDialog.beginnerStrongSuggestion: Still at the very beginning so clear strengths have not been identified yet.

confirmProfile.title: Confirm using this profile

confirmProfile.finalReviewTitle: Final review before applying this setup
confirmProfile.finalReviewDescription: Check the summary below. Once confirmed, this configuration becomes the active workspace profile.
confirmProfile.summaryHelper: Everything below will be saved as the current learning setup for this workspace.
confirmProfile.footerHelper: You can still go back to the wizard to edit before applying.

validation.invalidCharacters: Only use letters, numbers, and basic punctuation. Invalid characters will not be sent to the AI.
validation.noise: The content has too many repeated characters or symbols. Please enter it more clearly before the system calls the AI.
validation.knowledgeInputTooShort: Enter at least 3 meaningful characters so the AI can analyze your knowledge.
validation.currentLevelTooShort: Describe your current level with at least 4 meaningful characters.
validation.learningGoalTooShort: Your learning goal should have at least 10 meaningful characters before being sent to the AI.
validation.strongAreasTooShort: Strong areas should have at least 4 meaningful characters.
validation.weakAreasTooShort: Weak areas should have at least 4 meaningful characters.
validation.mockExamNameTooShort: The exam name should have at least 3 meaningful characters.
validation.inferredDomainTooShort: The domain needs at least 2 meaningful characters.
validation.defaultTooShort: The content is still too short to be sent to the AI.
validation.waitForAi: Please wait for the AI to finish analyzing your knowledge.
validation.aiAnalysisError: AI analysis failed. Please try again.
validation.domainRequired: Please select a domain suggested by the AI.
validation.saveFailed: Could not save the current step. Please try again.

create.title: Create Mock Test
create.desc: Create a comprehensive test covering an entire roadmap.
create.name: Mock Test Name
create.nameExample: E.g. IELTS, TOEIC 900, final Math 12 exam...
create.scopeNotice: Mock tests only generate single-answer multiple-choice questions. Listening, Writing, and Speaking are not supported, so the AI will skip them and only suggest text-based sections for exams like IELTS or TOEIC.
create.generatingTitle: Generating questions for your mock test...
create.generatingHint: This may take from 30 seconds to a few minutes depending on the number of questions.
create.onePerRoadmap: Each roadmap can have at most one mock test.
create.mockTestLimit: This roadmap already has a mock test. Only one is allowed per roadmap.
create.roadmapAlreadyHas: This roadmap already has a mock test. Please choose another roadmap.

edit.title: Edit Mock Test
edit.desc: Update mock test information, questions and answers.

structure.aiInstructionPlaceholder: E.g. Reading comprehension questions on a ~150-word technology passage. Each question should have 4 answer options A/B/C/D with only 1 correct answer.
structure.aiInstructionHint: Describe the topic, skill, and format as specifically as possible so the AI can generate more accurate questions. Minimum {{min}} characters.

structure.emptySections: No sections yet. Click "Add section" or use AI suggestions to start.
